project: Ink CLI Terminal Rendering Parity — Web-Derived Completion
description: Create the final Web-derived validation gate with PTY artifacts, Web checks, snapshot gates, default-path room/session validation, and an acceptance report.

userStories.title: Add a Web-derived validation command suite
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want one documented validation suite that covers all parity rules.
acceptanceCriteria: Add script, npm task, or documented command set that runs shared/model tests, Ink snapshots, Web semantic-hook tests, and PTY smoke checks relevant to Web-derived parity
Validation suite maps each check to PRD 08 matrix rows
Failure output names the failed rule or fixture rather than only a generic snapshot mismatch

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification

userStories.title: Add PTY visual flows for final parity evidence
userStories.description: As an SSH operator, I want terminal evidence for the actual workflows I use.
acceptanceCriteria: PTY flows cover `/status`, long output preview/details, JSON rendering, markdown/code rendering, slash palette, `/room`, `/session`, `/sessions`, `/session-current`, no startup warning noise, and NO_COLOR/narrow terminal variant
At least one PTY flow uses the real/local `pibo tui:sessions` path rather than only demo renderer fixtures
Artifacts include raw ANSI, clean text, final screen, metadata, input/assertions, and visual conversion or documented fallback

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification

userStories.title: Add Web semantic regression checks for shared fixtures
userStories.description: As a product maintainer, I want Web Terminal behavior protected while Ink changes continue.
acceptanceCriteria: Web tests verify shared fixtures render expected row hooks, status hooks, detail hooks, and structured card hooks
Collapsed/expanded Web behavior is asserted for long-output and JSON/detail fixtures
Web checks pass without changing Web visuals except intentional semantic hooks

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification

userStories.title: Create final acceptance report
userStories.description: As a user and reviewer, I want a clear report showing what passed and what remains.
acceptanceCriteria: Report under `docs/reports/` summarizes matrix coverage, commands run, artifact paths, evidence classification, observed results, and limitations
Report explicitly states whether production/web deployment was performed or not
Report includes room/session name resolution evidence and any remaining known gaps

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts

When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification

userStories.title: Run final gate commands and record results
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the branch to be merge-ready with evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: `npm run typecheck` passes
`npm test` passes
`npm run chat-ui:typecheck` passes when Web tests/hooks changed
`npm run chat-ui:build` passes when Web UI changed
Final PTY commands pass or documented limitations are approved before marking this PRD complete
